title: hieracium subexcelsius
intro: Hieracium subexcelsius is a lesser-known species of flowering plant in the sunflower family, commonly known as hawkweed. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Hieracium subexcelsius is often used in tinctures, infusions, and salves, although its widespread use and effectiveness have not been extensively scientifically documented.
